title: Command Cockpit Crew Deck
summary: Compressed the Agent Party into a compact crew selector inside the Command Cockpit so bot presence stays visible without becoming a tall roster.
proof: Scoped the Agent Party compression to the Command Cockpit so the full crew roster remains available elsewhere.
Reduced summary chip, card, avatar, stat, thread, and COM/Q/PATH action dimensions for a denser crew selector.
Preserved existing data bindings and local-only actions, including Comms drill-through, staged queue action, and Path jump.
Updated README, index marker, snapshot generation, regression floors, and trace metadata so the standalone atlas records the Crew Deck unlock.
